title: Luffy and Zoro Refuse to Fight
description: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Bellamy, Nami, Mont Blanc Cricket, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate. A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Whoo, boy. You sure surprised me.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: About an island floating in the sky...!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Hahaha! What ERA are you from...?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: The "knock-up stream" is one such phenomenon,

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What a letdown...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Listen up!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: The City of Gold!? The emerald Capital!?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: And people remark on guys like them...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Haha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: The trade- mark words of a loser!

dialogue.speaker: Mock Town pirate
dialogue.text: When I see dreamin' idiots like you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I just can't control myself!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Weak, pathetic runts like you playing pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ha, what a wedding!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: You're making the rum taste bad!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: It's just as Bellamy said!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Get out! Get out!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Get the hell outta this town!

summary: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
